items.name: Brother Maynard

portrait.alt: A medieval-adjacent caretaker holding a clipboard and looking concerned.

items.tagline: Caretaker of small problems with large warning labels.

children.text: Brother Maynard filled out this profile at 11:42 p.m. after deciding the pet situation had become "more of a community opportunity." Replies are usually fast unless someone is standing on the router.

seo.title: Brother Maynard | Pet Share
seo.description: Meet the caretaker behind one of Pet Share's most compact liabilities.

items.name: Dana Muffins

portrait.alt: A tired but friendly pet owner holding a lint roller and a travel mug.

items.tagline: Professional lint roller user and part-time couch negotiator.

children.text: Dana Muffins uses Pet Share the way other people use a neighborhood group: a little too honestly, with several photos and one apology typed before breakfast.

seo.title: Dana Muffins | Pet Share
seo.description: Meet Dana, a Pet Share owner with several washable rugs and a practical outlook.
